title: rubus hirtus subsp. brumalis
intro: Rubus hirtus subsp. brumalis, also known as the winter raspberry or snow raspberry, is a subspecies of raspberry native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subsp. brumalis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Rubus hirtus subsp. brumalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
